name: Hoisin-Sesame Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the crushed red pepper flakes and cook for about 30 seconds, until fragrant.
3. Stir in the minced ginger and garlic; sauté until the garlic is lightly golden, about 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Pour the flavored oil mixture into a small bowl.
5. Whisk in the hoisin sauce, balsamic vinegar, soy sauce, fresh orange juice, ground coriander, and Chinese 5 spice powder.
6. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
7. Allow the sauce to cool before serving at room temperature or warmed.
